title: The Condition You Did Not Know You Set
subtitle: A Self-Worth Reset for the Gen Z Professional
author: Adi Da
description:
For the professional who achieves everything and still feels like not enough.

This is not a productivity book. It is not about doing more, performing better, or earning your way to worth. It is about locating the invisible condition you set — the threshold you placed between yourself and the experience of being enough — and examining it honestly.

The Condition You Did Not Know You Set moves through twelve threshold moments that every high-achieving Gen Z professional knows: the standup where your contribution was noted and moved past, the promotion that didn't come despite excellent feedback, the comparison that started the moment you opened LinkedIn.

Each chapter offers a different lens: not on how to succeed, but on how to notice where you have made success the admission ticket to your own worth. And what happens when you set that ticket down.

Six hours. Twelve chapters. One question returned to from every angle: what would remain if you stopped performing?

Narrated by Adi Da. Published by Heart Balance.
